text:
The Day of Departure (の, Shuppatsu no Hi) is the 1 st volume of the Hunter × Hunter manga series. It was released by Shueisha on June 4 th , 1998 in Japan and by Viz Media on April 5 th , 2005 in English.

Chapters

1. The Day of Departure (の, Shuppatsu no Hi)
2. An Encounter in the Storm (のい, Arashi no Deai)
3. The Ultimate Choice (の, Kyūkyoku no Sentaku)
4. Kiriko: Wicked Magical Vulpes ( , Majū Kiriko)
5. The First Phase Begins: Part 1 (1①, Dai Ichi-ji Shiken Kaishi (Ichi))
6. The First Phase Begins: Part 2 (1②, Dai Ichi-ji Shiken Kaishi (Ni))
7. Respective Reasons (それぞれの, Sorezore no Riyū)
8. The Other Enemy (もうひとつの, Mō Hitotsu no Teki)

Summary

Gon Freecss has almost reached the age of twelve, the earliest age at which one is allowed to register for the Hunter Exam. Despite the objections of his aunt Mito (also his adoptive mother), Gon sets off to follow in the footsteps of his father, the legendary Hunter Ging Freecss.

However, registering for the Hunter Exam does not mean one can take it. Gon must journey from his native Whale Island to the location on the mainland where the exam is held. On the way, he must contend with fierce storms and screeners who weed out unpromising examinees. It is during this time that he meets and befriends his fellow examinees and future companions: the cold and determined Kurapika, and the seemingly brash and avaricious Leorio.

The trio reaches the hidden exam site shortly before registration is finalized. Gon quickly makes friends with a boy named Killua, the only other examinee as young as he is. The First Phase involves a marathon of unknown length through an underground tunnel and a deadly swamp to an unknown destination, led by the examiner Satotz. The situation becomes even more dangerous in the swamp when another examinee, the deadly Hisoka, believes that the first test is too boring and decides to "help" in the examination process.
